description_long: This is a one-kilogram bag of Great Value Granulated Sugar, packaged in a light blue and white paper bag with a crimped, folded top. The front of the bag prominently displays the brand name 'Great Value' in a blue oval, with 'Granulated Sugar' written in bold, dark blue letters beneath it. The packaging features decorative baking-themed graphics, such as cupcakes and whisks, in a lighter blue shade. Nutritional information, including a '30 Calories Per Serving' statement, is clearly visible on the front and side panels. The back of the bag contains a detailed nutrition facts label and additional product information. The bag appears slightly crumpled, suggesting it is flexible and not fully rigid, and is designed for easy handling and storage.
description: A crumpled light blue and white paper bag of Great Value Granulated Sugar with bold branding and baking-themed graphics. Nutritional information and serving details are clearly visible on the packaging.
description_view_0: The side view shows the nutrition facts label and the crimped, folded top of the bag, with some branding visible on the upper left.
description_view_1: The front view displays the 'Great Value' logo, 'Granulated Sugar' label, and '30 Calories Per Serving' prominently, along with decorative graphics.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows the back of the bag with additional branding, product information, and a barcode near the bottom.
description_view_3: Another front-facing view, similar to view 1, with the 'Great Value' logo and product name clearly visible, but with a slightly different angle on the crumpled top.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white oval 'Great Value' logo is visible on the front and side of the bag, with white text on a blue background.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the side of the bag, listing calories and other nutritional information.
